content.text: Now I understand the baseline script. I'll build broadcast-join and AQE optimization variants matching the same structure, since the resource YAML files aren't present locally on this cluster.

input.content:
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count, broadcast

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-Broadcast").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(broadcast(products), "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=broadcast  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=broadcast_join  benefit=avoids_shuffle_of_large_table_on_small_dim  note=small_products_table_broadcast_to_all_executors")
spark.stop()

content.content: File created successfully at: /tmp/skew_broadcast.py (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

input.content:
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-AQE").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=aqe  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=adaptive_query_execution  benefit=auto_splits_skewed_partitions_and_coalesces_small_ones  note=spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled")
spark.stop()

content.content: File created successfully at: /tmp/skew_aqe.py (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

tool_use_result.content:
import time
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import count

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName("DataSkew-AQE").getOrCreate()
spark.sparkContext.setLogLevel("WARN")

orders = spark.range(50000).selectExpr(
    "id as order_id",
    "CASE WHEN id % 2 = 0 THEN (id % 5) + 1 ELSE (id % 95) + 6 END as product_id",
    "CAST(id * 10.5 AS DOUBLE) as amount"
)
products = spark.range(1, 101).selectExpr(
    "id as product_id",
    "concat('Product_', cast(id as string)) as product_name",
    "concat('cat_', cast(((id-1) / 10 + 1) as string)) as category"
)

orders_skewed = orders.repartition(20, "product_id")
sizes = sorted(orders_skewed.rdd.mapPartitions(lambda it: [sum(1 for _ in it)]).collect(), reverse=True)
non_zero = [s for s in sizes if s > 0]
max_s = sizes[0]
min_s = min(non_zero) if non_zero else 1
print("skew_ratio=" + str(round(max_s / min_s, 1)) + "x  max_partition=" + str(max_s) + "  min_partition=" + str(min_s))

t = time.time()
result = (orders_skewed
    .join(products, "product_id")
    .groupBy("category").agg(count("order_id").alias("order_count"))
    .orderBy("category"))
result.show()
elapsed = time.time() - t

print("strategy=aqe  elapsed=" + str(round(elapsed, 2)) + "s")
print("optimization=adaptive_query_execution  benefit=auto_splits_skewed_partitions_and_coalesces_small_ones  note=spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled")
spark.stop()

input.command:
B64_BROADCAST=$(cat /tmp/b64_broadcast.txt)
cat > /tmp/skew-job-broadcast.yaml <<EOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-broadcast
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: broadcast
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: broadcast
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=\$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast join optimization)"
          echo "$B64_BROADCAST" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\
            --master local[2] \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \\
            --conf spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold=10485760 \\
            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
      restartPolicy: Never
      serviceAccountName: spark
EOF
echo "Written."
wc -l /tmp/skew-job-broadcast.yaml

B64_AQE=$(cat /tmp/b64_aqe.txt)
cat > /tmp/skew-job-aqe.yaml <<EOF
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-aqe
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: aqe
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: aqe
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=\$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (adaptive query execution, auto skew handling)"
          echo "$B64_AQE" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\
            --master local[2] \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \\
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.coalescePartitions.enabled=true \\
            --conf spark.sql.shuffle.partitions=20 \\
            /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
      restartPolicy: Never
      serviceAccountName: spark
EOF
echo "Written."
wc -l /tmp/skew-job-aqe.yaml
